data.title: Two-Factor Authentication
data.description: Critical defensive measure that requires a second factor for user account verification.
data.technical_spec: OTP via SMS or email for additional security layer.

data.title: Security Patches and Updates
data.description: Regular updates to fix vulnerabilities and enhance system security.

data.title: Data Encryption at Rest
data.description: Protects user data stored on servers from unauthorized access using encryption.

data.title: Spam and Abuse Detection
data.description: Automated mechanisms to prevent spam messages and abuse.
data.technical_spec: Machine learning algorithms for pattern recognition.

data.title: Vulnerability Disclosure Policy
data.description: Encourages third parties to report vulnerabilities to enhance security.
